message:
fix(migrate-issues): replace raw SQL with Storage interface for Dolt compatibility

migrate-issues used UnderlyingDB() type-assertion to SQLite and raw SQL
queries, which would fail on Dolt backend. Now uses the Storage interface:

- Add SourceRepo filter to IssueFilter (types, SQLite, Dolt SearchIssues)
- Add source_repo to allowed update fields (SQLite + Dolt)
- Replace raw SQL queries with SearchIssues, GetDependencyRecords,
  GetDependents, GetAllDependencyRecords, GetDependencyRecordsForIssues
- Replace raw transaction with RunInTransaction + UpdateIssue
- Remove database/sql and sqlite package imports

Closes: dolt-test-ztzb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1142,6 +1142,7 @@ func isAllowedUpdateField(key string) bool {
 		"description": true, "design": true, "acceptance_criteria": true, "notes": true,
 		"issue_type": true, "estimated_minutes": true, "external_ref": true, "spec_id": true,
 		"closed_at": true, "close_reason": true, "closed_by_session": true,
+		"source_repo": true,
 		"sender": true, "wisp": true, "wisp_type": true, "pinned": true,
 		"hook_bead": true, "role_bead": true, "agent_state": true, "last_activity": true,
 		"role_type": true, "rig": true, "mol_type": true,
